features.description: Design token substrate — themes, presets, and overrides. Always on. Baseline UX.
Selecting mode='dark' on themes + activating dark presets. Available on every tier — dark mode is a baseline UX expectation.
Author tenant-owned ThemePreset rows. Gated by theme_custom_presets slot entitlement.
Sparse patches on top of a preset (ThemeTokenOverride rows). Gated by theme_token_overrides slot entitlement.
WCAG AA/AAA contrast-ratio findings surfaced as recommendations. Informational only. Always on — accessibility is not a paywall.
Last-20 prior Theme rows retained for rollback (default: last-5). Enterprise only.
